source_rationale: Using the Cell Taxonomy database, clusters were annotated into 9 major cell types (Figures 1B-C), including NK cells identified by NKG7 expression (N=25,248), Mast cells identified by HPGDS expression (N=2,877), T cells identified by CD3D expression (N=6,576), Endothelial cells identified by PECAM1 expression (N=1,467), Plasma cells identified by MZB1 expression (N=994), B cells identified by MS4A1 expression (N=543), Myeloid dendritic cells identified by CLEC9A expression (N=269), Macrophages identified by C1QB expression (N=194), and Hepatocytes identified by ALB expression (N=143).
